statement: In every magma, Equation 1379 (`x = y * (((z * y) * w) * y)`) implies Equation 2847 (`x = ((x * (x * x)) * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0918
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z y) w) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op x (op x x)) x) x)
